what: Adversarial architecture/model review of the domain-contract registry and metadata complexity (FIN-REVIEW-005-*).
usage: Primary artifact for REVIEW-005: registry boundary findings, table keep/narrow/postpone assessment, invariant proposals, and next-slice recommendation.

what: Narrow adversarial follow-up review of Review 005 Slice 0, Slice 1, and Slice 1a implementation commits.
usage: Decision note for whether the registry control loop, metadata-reference model, and lookup-helper fix are coherent enough to continue; recommends the smallest safe next slice.

what: Decision note ordering the next slices (1b loop hardening, 1c convention-escape fixture, 1d Meta Registry Bridge) and settling the meta_registry.yaml vs meta_reference_surfaces.json relation.
usage: Confirms the Codex follow-up ordering with re-verified loopholes; rejects a JSON mirror of meta_registry.yaml in favor of a join column plus guards; contains the concrete Slice 1b implementation prompt.
